conclusion: Underwriter is Sirius Specialty Insurance Corporation (publ) — the predecessor entity to SiriusPoint Specialty Insurance Corporation. Certificate version dated 02.24.2021 v1.1. Plan Admin is IMG (AkesoCare for pre-certification).
exact_language: Sirius Specialty Insurance Corporation (publ) (the Company) promises and agrees to provide the Insured Person with the benefits described in the Master Policy
flag: NEEDS MANUAL REVIEW — Certificate is 2021 version. Verify if current master policy has been reissued under SiriusPoint name. Carrier name may be outdated.

conclusion: Period of Coverage limit: $50K, $100K, or $250K (age ≤64); $50K or $100K (ages 65+). Period 5 days to 12 months.
section: BENEFIT SUMMARY — Coverage Limit / Maximum Amount

conclusion: Deductible options: $100, $250, $500, $1,000, $2,500, or $5,000 per insured person. Note: NO $0 deductible option (unlike Patriot America Plus). For ages 70-79 with $100K max: minimum deductible is $1,000.
exact_language: Through age 79: $100, $250, $500, $1,000, $2,500 or $5,000 per Insured Person / Ages 70 to 79: $1,000, $2,500 or $5,000 for $100,000 Period of Coverage limit per Insured Person

conclusion: In-network: plan pays 100%, insured 0%, OOP max $0. Out-of-network: plan pays 80%, insured 20%, OOP max $1,000. International: plan pays 100%, OOP max $0. Note: weaker out-of-network coverage than Patriot America Plus (80% vs 90%).
section: BENEFIT SUMMARY — Coinsurance for Eligible Medical Expenses
exact_language: Coinsurance Plan pays 100% [in-network] Plan pays 80% [out-of-network] Plan pays 100% [international] / Out of Pocket Maximum $0 / $1,000 / $0

conclusion: CoverAmerica Gold explicitly requires B-1 or B-2 visa (or Visa Waiver Program). Initial Destination Country MUST be USA. Cannot be pregnant, hospitalized, or disabled on Initial Effective Date. USA must not be Country of Residence.
exact_language: Initial Destination Country must be the United States with the Insured Person traveling on a B1 or B 2 visa for tourism, visiting family and friends, on holiday, or temporarily enter the United States under a non-immigrant visa or under the visa waiver program

conclusion: Pre-existing conditions excluded. 3-year lookback period. Same definition as Patriot America Plus.
exact_language: Pre-existing Condition: Any Injury, Illness, sickness, disease, or other physical, medical, Mental or Nervous Disorder, condition or ailment that, with reasonable medical certainty, existed at the time of Application or at any time during the three (3) years prior to the Effective Date of this insurance, whether or not previously manifested, symptomatic or known, diagnosed, Treated, or disclosed to

benefit: Acute Onset of Pre-existing Conditions — Age ≤69
conclusion: Age ≤69: Acute Onset covered up to full Period of Coverage limit. EXCEPTION: Cardiac Coverage (Angina, Heart Attacks, Stroke) is capped at $36,000 maximum.
section: BENEFIT SUMMARY — Acute Onset of Pre-existing Conditions
exact_language: Through age 69: up to the Period of Coverage limit • Except Cardiac Coverage for Angina, Heart Attacks and Stroke: Maximum Limit $36,000

benefit: Acute Onset of Pre-existing Conditions — Age 70–79
conclusion: Age 70–79: Acute Onset covered up to $30,000. Cardiac Coverage (Angina, Heart Attacks, Stroke) NOT covered for ages 70+.
section: BENEFIT SUMMARY — Acute Onset of Pre-existing Conditions
exact_language: Ages 70 to 79: Maximum Limit: $30,000 • Except Cardiac Coverage for Angina, Heart Attacks and Stroke: Not covered

conclusion: Conditions: Treatment within 24 hours, not traveling against medical advice, not traveling to seek treatment, not in modified treatment program, pre-existing condition stabilized ≥30 days prior to Effective Date, must be outside Country of Residence. Chronic/congenital or gradually worsening conditions are NOT acute onset.
section: I. ACUTE ONSET OF PRE-EXISTING CONDITIONS — CONDITIONS AND RESTRICTIONS
exact_language: the Pre-existing Condition must have been stabilized for at least thirty (30) days prior to the Effective Date without change in Treatment / the Insured Person must be traveling outside their Country of Residence / a Pre-existing Condition that is chronic or congenital, or that gradually becomes worse over time and/or known, scheduled, required, or expected medical care, drugs or Treatments existing or necessary prior to the Effective Date are not considered an Acute Onset of Pre-existing Condition.

conclusion: ER for Injury: NOT subject to ER Deductible. In-network: 100%. Out-of-network: 80%.
section: BENEFIT SUMMARY — Hospital Emergency Room: United States
exact_language: Hospital Emergency Room: United States • Injury: Not subject to Emergency Room Deductible 100% [in-network] 80% [out-of-network]

conclusion: ER for Illness: $250 additional Deductible per ER visit if not directly admitted to Hospital. In-network: 100%. Out-of-network: 80%.
section: BENEFIT SUMMARY — Hospital Emergency Room: United States
exact_language: • Illness: Subject to a $250 Deductible for each Emergency Room visit for Treatment that does not result in a direct Hospital admission 100% [in-network] 80% [out-of-network]

conclusion: Inpatient hospitalization covered at average semi-private room rate. In-network: 100%. Out-of-network: 80%.
exact_language: Hospitalization / Room & Board • Average semi-private room rate • Includes nursing services, miscellaneous and Ancillary services 100% [in-network] 80% [out-of-network] 100% [international]

conclusion: ICU covered. In-network: 100%. Out-of-network: 80%. International: 100%.
exact_language: Intensive Care 100% [in-network] 80% [out-of-network] 100% [international]

conclusion: Surgery covered. In-network: 100%. Out-of-network: 80%. International: 100%.
exact_language: Surgery 100% [in-network] 80% [out-of-network] 100% [international]

conclusion: Prescriptions: Not Applicable in-network US. Out-of-network: 80%. International: 100%. 90-day dispensing limit.
exact_language: Prescriptions Not Applicable 80% 100% • Dispensing limit per prescription: 90 days

conclusion: Physical Therapy covered. In-network: 100%. Out-of-network: 80%. Requires medical order or treatment plan.
exact_language: Physical Therapy • Medical order or Treatment plan required 100% [in-network] 80% [out-of-network] 100% [international]

conclusion: COVID-19 covered BUT requires the Insured Person to have purchased an initial 30 days of coverage. Unlike Patriot America Plus which has no such waiting requirement.
exact_language: Charges for Treatment resulting from COVID-19/SARS-CoV-2 provided the Insured Person has purchased an initial thirty (30) days of coverage under this insurance plan

conclusion: Emergency Medical Evacuation: $1,000,000. Independent of Maximum Limit. INCLUDES Pre-existing conditions (unique feature). Must be approved in advance.
exact_language: Emergency Medical Evacuation • Independent of Maximum Limit per Period of Coverage • Maximum Limit: $1,000,000 • Includes Pre-existing conditions • Approved in advance and coordinated by the Company 100% 100% 100%

conclusion: Unique to CoverAmerica Gold: $550 benefit if B-1/B-2 visa holder is denied entry into the USA. Reimburses Common Carrier Change Fee. Does NOT apply to Visa Waiver travelers, US citizens, illegal entry, or visa violations.
exact_language: Border Entry Protection • Maximum Limit: $550 • Valid B1 and B2 visa Not Applicable 100% 100% • Common Carrier exchange fee • United States, Canada, Mexico

conclusion: Influenza (flu) vaccination covered for insured persons age 6 months and older. This is a unique preventive benefit not found in most visitor insurance plans.
exact_language: Charges for the Influenza (flu) vaccination for an Insured Person age six (6) months and older
